tc_001: I understand how frustrating that must be. A two-week delay is certainly longer than expected. Here's what I'd recommend: first, check your email for a shipping confirmation with a tracking number. You can track your package on the carrier's website. If the tracking shows the package is stuck or lost, please reach out to us with your order number and we'll look into it right away.
tc_002: I'm sorry to hear that your item arrived broken. Absolutely, you can request a refund. Please go to your order history, find the order, and click 'Request Return.' Upload a photo of the damaged item and we'll process your refund within 5-7 business days once we receive it back.
tc_003:
That sounds really frustrating. Here are some troubleshooting steps you can try:

1. Make sure your app is updated to the latest version
2. Clear the app cache (Settings > Apps > Our App > Clear Cache)
3. Restart your device
4. If the problem persists, try uninstalling and reinstalling the app

If none of these work, please reach out to our technical support team at support@example.com with your device model and operating system version, and we'll investigate further.
tc_004: Great to hear you're enjoying it! Upgrading to premium is easy. Just go to Settings > Subscription > Upgrade to Premium. We offer monthly ($9.99/mo) and annual ($89.99/yr) plans. The annual plan saves you about 25%. Premium includes priority support, advanced features, and unlimited storage. You can try it with our 30-day money-back guarantee — if you're not satisfied, just let us know and we'll refund you, no questions asked.
tc_005: I completely understand your frustration and I sincerely apologize for the experience you've had. Your satisfaction is our top priority. While I'd like to help resolve this for you directly, I understand you'd like to speak with a manager. Let me escalate this immediately. Could you please provide your account email or order number? I'll have a manager contact you within 24 hours. In the meantime, if there's anything specific I can address right now, I'm here to help. As per our policy, we always strive to resolve complaints within 48 hours and we never leave a customer unsatisfied.
tc_006: Sure thing! What's your billing question? I'm here to help. Just share the details and I'll get you an answer as quickly as I can.
tc_007: Oh no, double charges are never fun. Don't worry, we'll get this sorted out. First, check if one of the charges might be a pending authorization that will drop off in a few days. If both charges are fully posted, you can contact our billing team at billing@example.com or call 1-800-555-0123 with your order number, and we'll issue a refund for the duplicate charge. This typically takes 3-5 business days to appear back on your statement. We also recommend checking with your bank, as sometimes duplicate charges are flagged automatically and reversed by the payment processor before we even need to intervene in the process, which would be the fastest path to resolution for you in this particular situation.
tc_008:
To cancel your subscription, follow these steps:

1. Log into your account
2. Go to Settings > Subscription
3. Click 'Cancel Subscription'
4. Follow the prompts to confirm

Your access will continue until the end of your current billing period. If you change your mind, you can resubscribe at any time.
tc_009: I can see how that would be disappointing. Color differences can sometimes occur due to screen settings and lighting in product photography, but we want you to be happy with your purchase. You can initiate a return through your order history, or if you'd prefer an exchange, please contact us with your order number and the color you'd like instead. We'll arrange a free exchange for you.
tc_010: Yes, we do ship internationally! We currently deliver to over 50 countries, and Sweden is definitely on the list. International shipping typically takes 7-14 business days depending on your location. You'll be able to see the exact shipping cost and estimated delivery date at checkout when you enter your Swedish address. Please note that import duties and taxes may apply and are the responsibility of the recipient. Feel free to ask if you have any other questions!
